title: Fix API key configuration error for mobile Pocket Option screenshots

requirements.summary: Add API key validation to frontend/src/config/apiConfig.ts with Portuguese error message when key is missing
acceptanceCriteria: API key validation function exists in apiConfig.ts
Validation runs before any API request is sent
Portuguese error message 'CHAVE DE API NÃO CONFIGURADA' displays when key is missing
Error message includes instruction to configure key in settings

file_operations.description: Add validateApiKey() function that checks if Gemini API key is configured by calling backend.getGeminiApiKey(). Return validation result with error message 'CHAVE DE API NÃO CONFIGURADA - Configure a chave da API nas configurações' when key is null or empty. Export this function for use by analysisApi.ts and ProcessingScreen.tsx.

requirements.summary: Enhance frontend/src/services/analysisApi.ts to handle mobile Pocket Option screenshots with broker UI detection and preprocessing
acceptanceCriteria: Mobile screenshots from Pocket Option are correctly identified
Image preprocessing handles dark-themed Pocket Option charts
Broker UI elements (balance display, buttons, menus) are filtered or ignored during preprocessing
Chart candlestick data remains intact and readable after preprocessing
Analysis request successfully sends Pocket Option screenshots to Gemini API

file_operations.description: Add detectPocketOption() function that analyzes image metadata and visual characteristics (dark theme presence, specific UI element patterns visible in broker screenshots). Update preprocessImage() to detect Pocket Option interface elements and apply specialized preprocessing that preserves candlestick chart data while handling broker UI artifacts. Ensure the existing resize and format conversion logic remains compatible with mobile screenshots. Add comments documenting Pocket Option-specific handling steps.

requirements.summary: Add diagnostic logging to frontend/src/services/analysisApi.ts for mobile screenshot analysis requests
acceptanceCriteria: Logging captures mobile screenshot metadata (dimensions, size, format)
Logging identifies if uploaded image is a Pocket Option screenshot
Preprocessing steps are logged in sequence
API request payload details are logged before sending to Gemini
Error logs include enough context to diagnose API key configuration issues

file_operations.description: Add console.log statements throughout analyzeChart() function to log: 1) Image source metadata (dimensions, file size, format, aspect ratio) at upload, 2) Pocket Option detection result (true/false with confidence indicators), 3) Each preprocessing step applied (resize dimensions, format conversions, quality settings), 4) API request payload summary (endpoint, headers present, body size) before sending to Gemini, 5) API key validation status and any configuration errors. Include timestamp prefixes and structured log format for easier debugging.

requirements.summary: Update frontend/src/pages/ProcessingScreen.tsx to validate API key before starting analysis stages
acceptanceCriteria: API key validation occurs before 'Carregando imagem' stage
Processing stops immediately if key is missing
Error screen shows 'CHAVE DE API NÃO CONFIGURADA' message
Navigation button to Settings page is provided
User can configure API key and retry analysis without losing uploaded image

file_operations.description: Add API key validation check at the start of the analysis flow, before the 'Carregando imagem' stage begins. Import validateApiKey from apiConfig.ts and call it in useEffect. If validation fails, set error state with message 'CHAVE DE API NÃO CONFIGURADA - Configure a chave da API nas configurações', display error UI with a button labeled 'Ir para Configurações' that navigates to /settings using TanStack Router's useNavigate hook. Ensure the uploaded image remains in sessionStorage so user can retry after configuring the key. Do not proceed with any processing stages if validation fails.

requirements.summary: Add Gemini API key configuration field to Settings page with secure storage
acceptanceCriteria: Settings page displays 'Chave da API Gemini' input field
Input field uses password-type masking for security
Save button stores API key in backend or secure local storage
API key format validation prevents invalid keys from being saved
analysisApi.ts reads API key from saved configuration
Settings screen shows confirmation message after successful save

file_operations.description: Add a new settings section labeled 'Configuração da API' with a SettingRow component containing a password-type input field labeled 'Chave da API Gemini'. Add state management for the API key value. Include a 'Salvar' button that calls backend.setGeminiApiKey() (from the backend interface) to store the key securely. Add client-side validation to check API key format (non-empty, minimum length, starts with expected prefix if applicable). Display a success toast notification with Portuguese message 'Chave da API salva com sucesso' after successful save. Add useEffect to load current API key from backend.getGeminiApiKey() on component mount and populate the input field (masked). Handle loading and error states appropriately.

Update analyzeChart() function to retrieve the Gemini API key by calling backend.getGeminiApiKey() before making the external API request. Replace any hardcoded API key references with the dynamically retrieved key. Ensure the API key is included in the authorization headers when calling the Gemini Vision API. If getGeminiApiKey() returns null, throw an error with the Portuguese message 'CHAVE DE API NÃO CONFIGURADA' to trigger proper error handling upstream.
